Seri Kencana Berhad (Main Market issuer on the Malaysian exchange) — Incident and Training Note, 02 June 2026
Context: This document supports routine cyber/ESG tabletop exercises and operational readiness under PDPA and the Capital Markets and Services Act.
Crypto operations (educational): Marketing demo of CahayaPay tokenized loyalty wallet used test data only; no customer onboarding and not a security offering.
Cyber drill (educational): Simulated phishing to role mailboxes; no production access; outcome logged for awareness and anti-tipping training.
ESG overview (public): Our TCFD targets and 2025 emissions roadmap are already disclosed in the Sustainability Statement on the corporate website.
Insider-list practice (educational): Sample insider list used role codes, not real staff names; scenario tested blackout reminders and information-barrier handoffs.
Vendor incident (operational): Bayan Data Solutions Sdn Bhd reported brief API timeouts; resolved in 14 minutes; status was posted on the public service page.
Financing template (educational): The green sukuk term sheet template references pricing grid and commercial terms for training only; not indicative of live negotiations.
Preliminary internal alert (non-public): Anomalous access to the staging database with hashed login events was detected; investigation ongoing and not yet communicated via the exchange announcement platform.
Safeguards: No payment card data, identity document scans, or crypto wallet keys reside in staging; containment and forensics are in progress under PDPA protocols.
Treasury note (restricted workflow): Treasury is evaluating an unannounced sustainability-linked facility; draft commercial terms are under review; observe information barriers and avoid tipping.
Climate adaptation (operational): Flood resilience assessment relates to publicly advertised tenders; results will be shared via standard procurement notices.
Governance: Materiality will be assessed per the Capital Markets and Services Act and the Malaysian exchange listing requirements; this is not an announcement and should not be construed as price-sensitive unless escalated.
Intake details: Form type—Incident Intake; Case ID—INC-00X7; ISIN—MYXX000-FAKE; Department—Operations; Reporter—compliance-ops@seri-kencana.example.
Contacts: For PDPA queries use pdpa-help@seri-kencana.example; public hotline 1-300-88-FAKE is available for general inquiries.
Next steps: Internal updates will be posted on the intranet; any external disclosure, if required, will follow Board sign-off and exchange announcement procedures.
